subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh in truth is verily the Sovereign of existence, for those in the unseen and visible realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لسلطان الوجود لمن فی الغیب و الشهود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
